n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $417,601 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532120); class <5: 1,173 firms, avg revenue/firm $660,261 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $198,078 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 228 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,101,316 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $630,395 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 126 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,116,897 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,535,069 -> IN $1-10M band; class 20-99: 124 firms, avg revenue/firm $17,325,532 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,197,660 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 80 firms, avg revenue/firm $63,348,850 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $19,004,655 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 56 firms, avg revenue/firm $428,473,464 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $128,542,039 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 250
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
